changes: Multi-project build pipeline — any Python project compiles via a Project Profile; build.py receives --project-dir so one shared pipeline handles all apps
EXTRA_DATA profile setting — bundle arbitrary project files (e.g. dashboard.html) for projects without a templates/ subdirectory
Conditional templates/static bundling — projects without those directories compile cleanly
Build Dashboard Project Profile — pre-configured profile ships ready to use; select it and click Full Build to produce BuildDash.exe
Profile load refreshes Change Log and Build History — switching profiles immediately shows the correct data for the loaded project
Help docs updated — Project Profiles section corrected (build_projects.json vs build_settings.json), Self-Compile section rewritten
Build History — record every build (version, type, description, git commit, settings snapshot) and rebuild any past version from a dropdown
Build Type selector — tag each build as Main, Incremental, or HOTFIX
Build Notes field — attach a short description to each build for the history log
Per-project Change Log — draft upcoming changes, configure a version trigger (Major / Minor / Patch / Never), auto-promote draft to a version entry at compile time
Change Log editor — export to CHANGELOG.md, edit in Notepad++, reload back into JSON
Granular Clean — separate buttons for Compile Temp, Output Folder, and Logs
Robust directory removal — PowerShell Remove-Item replaces shutil.rmtree for reliable deletion on Windows
Test Pipeline fix — installs now use %LOCALAPPDATA% instead of %TEMP% to avoid Application Control policy blocks (WinError 4551)
Build Dashboard What's New — this dialog, showing the Build Dashboard's own changelog
GitHub integration — auth badge, folder browser, remote URL validation with green/red pulse, repo picker modal
Pull Requests card — list open PRs and create new PRs via gh CLI
Local Backup card — robocopy-based backup with destination browser and schedule dropdown
Build Dash Daemon — background process with system tray icon, PID-file based start/stop, Build .exe button
Pipeline Sounds — custom success and failure audio clips played at build and test completion
Inject Metadata — standalone button to embed version, company, and description into an existing compiled .exe
Version Management — read version from main branch, live display next to the version spinner
Initial release of Build Dashboard
Full Build, Bundle Only, and Installer Only compile modes
Full-Build Install Test Pipeline — silent install, exe launch, HTTP poll, app log capture, Test Report
Code protection — Plain (no protection), PyArmor source obfuscation, Nuitka native machine code
License file selector with 30+ templates across Protective, Open Source, and Commercial categories
README generator — auto-generates a project README from app settings
Git integration — commit & push, branch merge, git status display
Project profiles — save and load named setting sets to switch between multiple apps
New App button — clears App Identity fields to start a fresh project without losing build settings
Virus scan step before every compile
Timestamped build log files saved to Output/Log/ on every build
